raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Clean this up' most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement to reduce repetition, improve flow, and tighten wording.","RX.1":"Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty where the artifact reports evaluation results and model behavior.","RX.2":"The cleaned text should avoid strengthening claims beyond the reported correlations, dataset coverage, and stated procedure.","RX.3":"The request is broad but still bounded to cleanup, not redesigning the methodology or adding new scientific claims.","RX.4":"Because the passage concerns model evaluation, cleanup should not introduce misleading impressions about reliability or human alignment.","RX.5":"The cleaned version should preserve traceability to the original reported procedure, benchmark sizes, languages, and appendix reference."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement to reduce repetition, improve flow, and tighten wording.
rationale.RX.1: Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty where the artifact reports evaluation results and model behavior.
rationale.RX.2: The cleaned text should avoid strengthening claims beyond the reported correlations, dataset coverage, and stated procedure.
rationale.RX.3: The request is broad but still bounded to cleanup, not redesigning the methodology or adding new scientific claims.
rationale.RX.4: Because the passage concerns model evaluation, cleanup should not introduce misleading impressions about reliability or human alignment.
rationale.RX.5: The cleaned version should preserve traceability to the original reported procedure, benchmark sizes, languages, and appendix reference.
